doc: Push collision bodies apart to a target separation with polyfem (AMIPS + fitting + Laplacian + GCP contact); outer loop per `strategy`.
Input multi-tag .msh path.
Output path stem; the deformed mesh is written to <output>.msh and working artifacts next to it.
Pairs of interfaces to push apart.
One collision pair: [side_A, side_B].

One side: the boundary of `region`, kept where the outside cell satisfies `filter` (both wmtk Boolean expressions; a bare string is a region). Normals point out of the region. Identical selections dedupe to one collision body; reuse an explicit id to merge distinct selections into one body.
Boolean expression for the region whose boundary is selected.
Boolean expression the outside cell must satisfy (optional; omit to keep the whole boundary).
Collision body id; auto-assigned when omitted.
Target minimum separation distance in solver units (mesh units * scale).
Mesh-to-solver unit scale.
Add the fitting penalty anchoring interface nodes near rest pose.
Add the Laplacian smoothness penalty.
Combinatorial instead of geometric Laplacian.
Normalize the penalty matrices.
Soft-constraint weight on fitting.
Soft-constraint weight on the Laplacian.
Per-tag AMIPS weight overrides, e.g. {"ambient": 1e-6}.
AMIPS weight for one tag.
Initial contact dhat; <= 0 (default) means measure the initial gap with a zero-stiffness probe solve and start the ramp at dhat_growth * gap.
Max outer iterations (dhat ramp / stiffness loop).
Relative tolerance on the achieved separation.
Polyfem nonlinear solver iteration cap.

Contact barrier stiffness; <= 0 (default) = auto per strategy. dhat ramp: 1e6 (fixed for the whole ramp — too soft stalls below the target, over-stiff only makes the gap hug dhat; transfers across resolutions with normalize_penalties). stiffness strategy: 1 (soft start does the bulk displacement cheaply; the loop raises kappa itself).
GCP normal smoothing parameter.
GCP tangential smoothing parameter.
Emit paraview output (slow).

Outer loop: "dhat" ramps dhat multiplicatively from the measured geometric gap (next dhat = dhat_growth * active) at fixed barrier stiffness, binary-searching on overshoot; "stiffness" (experimental) pins dhat at sep*(1+rtol) and raises the barrier stiffness until the separation clears sep (overshoot bounded by rtol by construction).

strategy=dhat: multiplicative dhat schedule — next dhat = dhat_growth * measured active distance. Values <= 2 keep the measured gap on the exact (4/3)(1-x)^3 outer branch of the GCP barrier (x = active/dhat >= 0.5).
strategy=stiffness: cap on the per-iteration barrier-stiffness growth factor (protects Newton conditioning).
Regions held exactly at rest during the solve (hard pin on every node of the matching cells): the contact pushes only the unprotected side and protected geometry stays bit-identical.
wmtk Boolean cell expression, e.g. "floor" or "rod | anchor".

Tag names treated as ambient in the polyfem reduction (e.g. user primitives like box_0): cells whose tags are all ambient-like get the ambient AMIPS weight and volume normalization; cells also carrying a body tag stay body. Mirror of the wmtk remeshing key.
A tag name.
